filters.notes: stmt IS NOT NULL; table sorted by stmt; zone map skips any all-NULL blocks (max_val == -1)

data_structures.aggregation: direct_array[S*R] where S=stmt_dict.size(), R=rfile_dict.size(); index = stmt_code*R + rfile_code; fits in L1 cache (8 slots)
data_structures.count_distinct_adsh: bitset per group over 86135 adsh codes (86135 bits = ~10.75 KB/group x 8 groups = ~86 KB per thread); thread-local, OR-merge after parallel phase
data_structures.zone_map: pre_stmt_zone_map.bin — iterate 97 blocks, skip block if max_val == -1

thread_local.adsh_bitset: uint64_t[S*R][ceil(86135/64)] — one bitset per group slot

parallelism.merge: sequential post-barrier merge of 8-slot arrays (cnt, sum_line) + bitset OR per group; trivial cost at 8 groups

indexes.purpose: skip_blocks where block max_val == -1 (all-NULL stmt blocks)

scan.notes: Selectivity ~99.9% — fused scan+filter+aggregate in one loop body; selection vector overhead not worthwhile. Process row i: if stmt_col[i]==-1 skip; else key=stmt_col[i]*R+rfile_col[i]; cnt[key]++; sum_line[key]+=line_col[i]; set bit adsh_col[i] in adsh_bitset[key].

output_phase.decode: for each non-zero cnt slot: stmt_dict[stmt_code], rfile_dict[rfile_code]
output_phase.num_filings: popcount over adsh_bitset[key] (86135 bits = 1344 uint64_t words per group)
output_phase.sort: std::sort on at most 8 result rows — trivial
